message:
test(palette): regression tests and deterministic behavior lock-in (1mfw3.1.6)

12 new tests: deterministic action ordering, full lifecycle (open→query→
navigate→execute→close), filter mode round-trip, zero-result safety,
selection clamping, rapid open/close stability, boundary navigation wrapping,
PaletteResult dispatch coverage (all 28 variants), reopen-after-execute reset,
and valid labels invariant. Total palette test count: 124.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
